case_title: WALKER, PHYLLIS et al vs. SMITH, SANDRA et al

docket_entries.description: LAW AND MOTION, DEPT 02, HEARING ON CLAIM OF RIGHT TO POSSESSION, CALENDAR OF OCT-08-1997, GRANTED PURSUANT TO WRITTEN ORDER SHERIFF IS NOT TO REMOVE OR EVICT CLAIMANT. THE UNLAWFUL DETAINER IS BASED ON CURABLE BREACH. THE CLAIMANT MUST BE SERVED WITH PROPER NOTICE, IF NOTICE IS REQUIRED. IF THE CLAIMANT DOES NOT TIMELY CURE THE BREACH, THEN SUPPLEMENTAL COMPLAINT IS TO BE FILED & SERVED ON CLAIMANT... SEE ORDER.
